System Design Document — Event Streaming Pipeline: This document describes the architecture of the real-time event streaming pipeline used to process user activity events from mobile and web clients. Events are published to Kafka topics partitioned by user_id, consumed by Flink jobs that apply enrichment and aggregation, and materialized to both a data warehouse (Snowflake) and a Redis cache for real-time dashboard queries. The pipeline is designed for 99.9% availability with a recovery time objective (RTO) of 15 minutes and a recovery point objective (RPO) of 5 minutes. Capacity is currently provisioned for 250,000 events per second with headroom to scale horizontally.
